svg.title: Deepfake Detection System Architecture
svg.desc: Four-layer architecture: Input, Processing, Dual-Stream CNN, and Output with API
svg.text: PyTorch 2.x · ResNet-18 · NumPy FFT · MTCNN · Flask · Gunicorn · Docker · TensorBoard · Albumentations
Datasets: FaceForensics++ · DFDC · Celeb-DF v2 · FFHQ
